name: Dynamic HTTP Security Probe
description: VRT-mapped dynamic scanner that makes real HTTP requests to a live target and inspects the response for the misconfigurations a source scan cannot see: missing/weak security headers (HSTS, CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options), insecure cookie flags (Secure/HttpOnly/SameSite), permissive CORS, unsafe HTTP methods (TRACE/PUT/DELETE), clickjacking exposure, server/tech banner disclosure, directory listing, verbose error/debug pages, mixed content, and cleartext transport.
author: NisargHunter AI core

permissions.reason: Sends GET/OPTIONS requests to the authorized target to inspect its live HTTP responses.
